diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,146 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports Hono class and types
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: main entry point re-exporting Hono class and all public types
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, re-exports Hono from ./hono and types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, HandlerInterface, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, H, HandlerResponse, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, MergeSchemaPath, IntersectNonAnyTypes, ExtractInput, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: comprehensive type definitions for Hono including handlers, routers, env, and request handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: 1450+ lines, extensive type interfaces with overloads for handler methods (app.get with 1-10 handlers, app.on, app.use), includes Env/Variables/Bindings, implements generic handler patterns with environment and schema parameters
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: main Hono class extending HonoBase with router configuration and constructor
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, defines Hono class with generic Env/Schema/BasePath parameters, sets default router to SmartRouter, extends HonoBase in constructor
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, request, fire methods
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoOptions, compose, Context, Router, Env, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: base implementation of Hono class with routing, middleware composition, and request handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, implements request routing via router, middleware composition via compose function, Context creation, method handlers (get/post/etc), on handler for multiple methods, route for grouping apps, basePath for prefixing, mount for attaching other frameworks, custom 404 and error handlers
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond methods
+- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, Data, DefaultRenderer, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, ResolveCallback, ResponseHeader, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, JSONParsed, JSONValue, TextRespond, JSONRespondReturn, StatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, Headers, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Context class providing response rendering methods and request variable access
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, implements get/set for context variables, text/json/html/redirect/notFound response methods, headers management, rendering with layouts, HonoRequest instantiation
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, GET_MATCH_RESULT, HTTPException, Result, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseBody, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, decodeURIComponent_, tryDecode, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, Simplify, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: request processing utilities for parameters, queries, headers, and body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, HonoRequest class with param/query/header/queryParams methods, body caching for json/text/arrayBuffer/blob/bytes/FormData, path/route extraction, cloneRawRequest for reconstructing consumed request bodies
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: exports a unique symbol for matching result from requests
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports GET_MATCH_RESULT as unique symbol for marker patterns
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: parseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, ParseBodyOptions, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: parses request body from multipart/form-data or form-urlencoded content
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, handles multi-value fields and dot notation nesting, converts FormData to JSON-serializable objects, strips File objects, supports all/dot parsing options
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: composes middleware/ handlers into single dispatch function
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, wraps array of middleware arrays into dispatcher that calls handlers and handles errors/not-found via compose function pattern
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class with optional response object
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error, takes status code and optional response/message/cause, getResponse method returns constructed or provided Response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/client, ./client/utils, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: client module exports hc helper, response parser, and typed error class
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports from client submodules exposing hc, parseResponse, and DetailedError publicly
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc
+- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, proxyCallback, createProxy, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types, ./client/types, ./utils
+- Plain-English search: 223 lines, hc function creates proxy that routes to server, ClientRequestImpl handles fetch calls, supports path/query/body parameters, handles GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS/PATCH, supports WebSocket connections, merges request options
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, InferEndpointType, InferResponseType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, Client, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, BuildSearchParamsFn, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./hono-base, ./router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for HTTP client including request/response typing and path building
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, defines hc return types, ClientResponse with typed body parsing, path param and query handling, protocol transformation (ws/http), URL building from host/path, schema extraction patterns, status code filtering types
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, DetailedError, fetchRP, DetailedError, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ClientResponse, ObjectType, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, IsObject, KnownResponseFormat, ExtractSchema, ResponseFormat, HasRequiredKeys
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./client/fetch-result-please, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: client helper utilities for URL manipulation and request building
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, mergePath concatenates paths, replaceUrlParam substitutes URL params, buildSearchParams creates URLSearchParams, deepMerge for option objects, parseResponse wrapper around fetchRP with error handling
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, Response, content-type
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: fetch wrapper that smartly parses responses and throws structured errors
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, fetchRP awaits fetch and extracts body if response is ok, detects json or text by content-type, throws DetailedError with statusCode/detail if not ok, DetailedError extends Error with detail/code/log/statusCode properties
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./adapter/service-worker/handler
+- Plain-English summary: registers Hono app as service worker fetch handler
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fire function adds listener('fetch') with handle as response handler, delegates to app.fetch, passes fetch callback via options
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: handle, FetchEvent, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./adapter/service-worker/types
+- Plain-English summary: creates fetch event handler that calls Hono.app.fetch and responds
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, returns function taking FetchEvent, calls evt.respondWith, invokes app.fetch with evt.request and execution context, optionally falls back to custom fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ./adapter/service-worker/handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent interface compatible with standard Event
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, ExtendableEvent with waitUntil, FetchEvent adds clientId/handled/preloadResponse/resultingClientId/request/respondWith methods
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
